title: Absorption Receipt Schema v2
description: Schema for recording the absorption of a sovereign Construction repository into the Construction OS v2 monorepo container.

receipt_id.description: Unique identifier for this absorption receipt

source_repo.description: Name of the sovereign repository that was absorbed

source_commit_sha.description: Commit SHA of the source repo at the time of absorption

destination_folder.description: Target folder within the Construction OS v2 monorepo

absorbed_by.description: Identity of the agent or authority that performed the absorption

authority_command.description: L0 command document ID authorizing this absorption

integrity_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the absorbed content for integrity verification

status.description: Final status of the absorption operation
